title: pelargonium × heterotrichum
intro: Pelargonium × heterotrichum, also known as Mountain Rose, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which are attributed to the presence of geraniol, a natural compound that has been shown to exhibit antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Pelargonium × heterotrichum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of colds and flu, as well as its ability to soothe digestive issues and promote a sense of calm. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which are traditionally used to support immune function and overall well-being.
